description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by tan polymer furniture including the adjustable stock, pistol grip, and foregrip. The rifle is equipped with a detachable curved magazine, likely for intermediate cartridges, and a prominent suppressor attached to the end of the barrel. On top, a red dot or holographic sight is mounted on a Picatinny rail, enhancing aiming capabilities for urban engagements. The handguard is modular, with accessory rails and a mounted tactical device, possibly a flashlight or laser. The overall build suggests a blend of durability and ergonomic handling, suitable for rapid deployment in urban environments.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a black metal body, tan adjustable stock, suppressor, and mounted sight, designed for urban use. Features include a curved magazine, accessory rails, and ergonomic grips.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, tan adjustable stock, curved magazine, suppressor, and mounted sight.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the Picatinny rail, mounted sight, and the alignment of the stock and barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tan stock, curved magazine, suppressor, and tactical accessory on the handguard.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the suppressor, barrel, and the alignment of the sight and handguard.
